description: Adversarial invariants from the manual accuracy sample: keep early electrical motors and grids from depending on later generation technologies.

checks.reason: Faraday's 1821 electric motor predates the graph's 1831 dynamo/electric-generator node.
Early 1882 central distribution systems predate Parsons's 1884 steam turbine.
The electric motor node is scoped to Faraday's first electromagnetic-rotation motor.
The dynamo node is scoped to Faraday's generator lineage, after the motor principle.
The grid node is scoped to early central distribution such as Pearl Street.
The steam-turbine node should remain later than early central electrical distribution.
